title: stelis tinekae
intro: Stelis tinekae is a species of orchid native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis tinekae include potential treatments for skin conditions, respiratory issues, and even certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Stelis tinekae are often made by infusing the plant's roots or leaves in hot water to create teas or tinctures.
